_comment: Non-secret template for MarginEngineV2 deploy + rewire on Base Sepolia (V2D-L). Never put private keys here; the operator passes DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY inline at command time. See docs/MARGIN_ENGINE_V2_DEPLOY_REWIRE_PREFLIGHT_V2D_L.md.

operatorInputs.INITIAL_OWNER: 0xc35F7A8A103A9A4464adfaa76B9B514093D23C27 (must equal deployer; recommended to transferOwnership to ProtocolTimelock 0xa67f8e8e...3b588 after the rewire ships and before FeesManagerV2 Phase 7)
operatorInputs.INITIAL_GUARDIAN: 0xc35F7A8A103A9A4464adfaa76B9B514093D23C27 (matches the live guardian; rotate later if a dedicated operational actor is in place)

operatorInputsAfterDeploy.NEW_MARGIN_ENGINE: <filled in from DeployMarginEngineV2 script output; record here AND in backend env and docs>

REWIRE_MARGIN_ENGINE_V2_CONFIRM.purpose: Gates RewireMarginEngineV2's six on-chain admin setter calls.

phases.name: Deploy MarginEngineV2
preconditions: Broadcaster derives to current MarginEngine owner 0xc35F7A8A...3C27

phases.name: Rewire dependents
preconditions: Backend operator pre-stages multi-emitter indexing (OLD + NEW)

phases.name: (later) FeesManagerV2 deploy/wire/enable against NEW
preconditions: V2D-I §6 go/no-go checklist re-signed against NEW_MARGIN_ENGINE

rollbackPlan.afterDeployBeforeRewire: Do nothing — the new MarginEngine is idle, no dependent points at it.
rollbackPlan.afterV2Enable: cast send NEW 'setUseFeesManagerV2(bool)' false; or full rewire-back per V2D-L §13.3.
rollbackPlan.guardian: Any MarginEngine owner-set guardian can call pauseTrading() to freeze option trades while the owner mobilizes.

strandedStateWarning: Positions opened on OLD MarginEngine before cutover REMAIN on OLD after rewire.
OLD continues to hold _positions, seriesShortOpenInterest, seriesActivationState, and event history.
NEW MarginEngine starts blank; there is NO automatic migration.
CollateralVault.balances are unchanged across the rewire; trader USDC stays usable against NEW.
Acceptable on testnet only; not a mainnet migration plan.
remainingBlockers: EIP-170 contract size limit (V2D-L §10) — MarginEngine bytecode is 26,085 > 24,576 bytes. Resolution belongs to docs/architecture/CONTRACT_SIZE_REDUCTION_PLAN.md.
Governance approval of the redeploy (V2D-K §4 Option B).
Backend operator on-call with multi-emitter indexing pre-staged.
Operator addresses for FeesManagerV2 (V2D-I §1) re-confirmed against the NEW MarginEngine.
deployments/base-sepolia.manifest.draft.json updated post-cutover with new address + block number.
